title: chore(deps): update dependency golangci/golangci-lint to v2.3.1
body:
This PR contains the following updates:

| Package | Update | Change |
|---|---|---|
| [golangci/golangci-lint](https://redirect.github.com/golangci/golangci-lint) | patch | `2.3.0` -> `2.3.1` |

---

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>golangci/golangci-lint (golangci/golangci-lint)</summary>

### [`v2.3.1`](https://redirect.github.com/golangci/golangci-lint/blob/HEAD/CHANGELOG.md#v231)

[Compare Source](https://redirect.github.com/golangci/golangci-lint/compare/v2.3.0...v2.3.1)

1. Linters bug fixes
   - `gci`: from 0.13.6 to 0.13.7
   - `gosec`: from 2.22.6 to 2.22.7
   - `noctx`: from 0.3.5 to 0.4.0
   - `wsl`: from 5.1.0 to 5.1.1
   - tagliatelle: force upper case for custom initialisms

</details>

---
